title: BlackSoul
description: BlackSoulIt is PvP pack for minecraft black coloured based theme with small swords custom sky and more
body:
This time I present you "BlackSoul" PvP pack. its is a PvP texture pack it changes textures of every item and GUI based on dark colours. This pack makes your PvP fights better and by new texture you can enjoy the minecraft new way.

You might ask ?
What does your project add? It redesign your whole minecraft textures
What features does it have? Better performance,good looking textures
Why would a user want to download it? Because its the best black themed texture pack
